properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Early will I rise and worship You Giving you thanks, for all that you do My sacrifice off praise I offer You And You give to me, that sweet melody

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You are my song, You are my song You are the reason, I sing this song to You You are my song, You are my song You are the reason, I sing to you

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Early will I rise and worship You Giving You thanks, for all that you do My sacrifice off praise I offer You And You give to me, that sweet melody

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You are my song, You are my song You are the reason, I sing this song to You You are my song, You are my song You are the reason, I sing to you

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I will sing a new song unto You Words from the heart, broken apart There is nothing like we rather do 'Cause You are my joy, to You I employ

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You are my song, You are my song You are the reason, I sing this song to You You are my song, You are my song You are the reason, I sing to you
